original_question:
For all values $x$ where it is defined, define $f(x) = \cot \frac{x}{3} - \cot 2x$. The function can be expressed as
\[f(x) = \frac{\sin kx}{\sin \frac{x}{3} \sin 2x}.\]
Find the value of $k$.

Present the answer in LaTex format: \boxed{Your answer}
